name: Rejoice Mark
title: Executive Director
bio: Rejoice founded CBI in 2019 with a vision to deliver integrated humanitarian care to Nigeria's most vulnerable communities. She brings over 15 years of NGO leadership experience.

name: Thomas Umazayi Dayo
title: Program Manager
bio: Thomas oversees CBI's program portfolio across all six thematic areas, ensuring quality delivery and alignment with humanitarian standards.

name: Sarauniya Esther Elbuba
title: Human Resource Coordinator
bio: Sarauniya manages CBI's human resources, staff welfare, and organizational capacity development.

name: Isaiah Yakubu
title: Program Coordinator
bio: Isaiah coordinates field-level program implementation, community engagement, and partner liaison in the North-East region.

name: Aisha Mohammed
title: MEAL Coordinator
bio: Aisha leads CBI's Monitoring, Evaluation, Accountability and Learning systems, ensuring evidence-based program improvements.

name: Emmanuel Bello
title: Logistics Coordinator
bio: Emmanuel manages CBI's supply chain, fleet, and operational logistics across all field offices.

name: Fatima Usman
title: Finance Coordinator
bio: Fatima oversees financial management, donor reporting, and compliance with CBI's financial policies.

name: Daniel Okafor
title: ICT Coordinator
bio: Daniel manages CBI's digital infrastructure, data systems, and technology solutions for program delivery.

name: Grace Adamu
title: Field Officer
bio: Grace leads community mobilization and field activities for CBI's programs in Adamawa State.
